title: V8 RISC-V: Drumbrake CWasmEntry uses wrong root register
bounty_rationale:
This is not shipped with Chrome


Note that the fact that this issue is not being rewarded does not mean

description_snippet:
VULNERABILITY DETAILS

CWasmEntry builtin initializes `kRootRegister` from the wrong C argument (`a0`), but the isolate root is passed as the 3rd argument (`a2`). This misinitialization makes isolate-field accesses and root-relative loads/stores interpret a heap object pointer as the isolate root, w
